# dataframe_to_influxdb

## Purpose

Bulk-write a Pandas DataFrame to InfluxDB 2.x / 3.x as line-protocol points. Auto-classifies tags (non-numeric) vs fields (numeric) when not explicitly listed.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name. |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | Upstream asset providing the DataFrame. |
| `measurement` | `str` | InfluxDB measurement name. |
| `bucket` | `str` | Destination bucket. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url_env_var` | `str` | `"INFLUXDB_URL"` | Env var with InfluxDB base URL. |
| `token_env_var` | `str` | `"INFLUXDB_TOKEN"` | Env var with API token. |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `batch_size` | `int` | `5000` | Rows per write batch. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"influxdb"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | — |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | — |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | — |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `timestamp_column` | `str` | `"timestamp"` | Column with datetime timestamps. |
| `tag_columns` | `List[str]` | — | Columns to use as tags (low-cardinality, indexed). Auto-derived if unset. |
| `field_columns` | `List[str]` | — | Columns to use as fields (values, numeric). Auto-derived if unset. |
| `org_env_var` | `str` | `"INFLUXDB_ORG"` | Env var with organization name. |
| `request_timeout_ms` | `int` | `30000` | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.DataframeToInfluxDBComponent
attributes:
  asset_name: influxdb_metrics_write
  upstream_asset_key: service_throughput_per_region
  measurement: service_throughput
  bucket: metrics
  url_env_var: INFLUXDB_URL
  token_env_var: INFLUXDB_TOKEN
  org_env_var: INFLUXDB_ORG
  timestamp_column: ts
  tag_columns: [region, service]
  field_columns: [throughput, errors]
```

## Validation level

**code** — see the matching `vendors/<name>.md` page for live demo status.
